_contract: Cross-service source_coverage contract fixtures (readiness gap X2). This file is committed BYTE-IDENTICAL in two repos: sCAST at artifacts/scent-cast/src/lib/sourceCoverageContractFixtures.json (consumed by sourceCoverageContract.test.ts asserting isSourceCoverageComplete) and srt-scent-engine at contract/source_coverage_fixtures.json (consumed by test_source_coverage_contract.py asserting _source_coverage produces the engine_producible shapes). The two repos deploy independently; if either side changes the shape or the predicate, its own CI goes red before production drifts. When you intentionally change the contract, update BOTH copies in lockstep.

fixtures.name: dual_source_complete
fixtures.description: BN + FG both contributed and all 4 FG status-metric groups arrived — the fully-enriched steady state. The SPA self-heal loop must STOP here.

fixtures.name: bn_only_partial
fixtures.description: Basenotes contributed, Fragrantica did not (the routine Cloudflare-403 outcome). The SPA must keep the heal loop running.

fixtures.name: fg_data_metrics_incomplete
fixtures.description: FG contributed cards but the 4 status-metric groups did NOT all arrive — engine considers this still-partial and the SPA must keep refreshing (the a781cf0 honesty fix).

fixtures.name: legacy_metrics_flag_only
fixtures.description: SPA-robustness case (not engine-producible today): older payload without `complete`, carrying only fragrantica_metrics_complete.

fixtures.name: legacy_derived_string_only
fixtures.description: SPA-robustness case (not engine-producible today): older payload where completeness is only expressed via derived_metrics string.

fixtures.name: empty_coverage
fixtures.description: Degenerate payload: an empty object must never read as complete.
